name: Satoru Gojo and Shoko Ieiri
description:
And after all this time.. Im still into you (not the white hair bum)

fempov

Where User has led Satoru to believed they liked him when he has it all wrong

casual misunderstanding.

"Eh? What do you mean? So your telling me I've been taking things the wrong way?"

"Me? Your confessing to me? Is this what it feels like to be Satoru."

You cant even blame Satoru for getting it all mixed up, actually no you could. I mean how obvious did they need to be? I mean they always shoved him to the side and got puffed up when Shoko's attention was else where then theirs. Well theyd always burst in to Satoru's dorm at times, demanding where Shoko was. Satoru obviously took those moments, thinking it was just an act to see him all alone, but boy was he just wrong.

Geto in this AU sticks with Nanami instead because I said so.

Might make a satoru and geto one but I HATE that fraud. I hate that im getting in to jjk only now, I tried 2 years ago but I was such a big one piece fan. So yeah.
creator: yuinapaa
